  • 构造器详细资料

    • ParamsBuildHelper

      public ParamsBuildHelper()

  • 方法详细资料

    • buildParams

      public static List<ApiParam> buildParams(String className, String pre, int level, String isRequired, boolean isResp, Map<String,String> registryClasses, ProjectDocConfigBuilder projectBuilder, Set<String> groupClasses, Set<String> methodJsonViewClasses, int pid, boolean jsonRequest, AtomicInteger atomicInteger)
      Builds a parameter list based on field information.
      参数:
      className - The name of the generic type.
      pre - A prefix builder for nested fields.
      level - The next level of nesting.
      isRequired - Indicates whether the parameter is required.
      isResp - Indicates whether the parameter is a response parameter.
      registryClasses - A collection of registered classes.
      projectBuilder - A project builder instance.
      groupClasses - A collection of JSR303 grouped classes.
      methodJsonViewClasses - A set of valid `@JsonView` classes on controller method.
      pid - The parent ID of the field.
      jsonRequest - The JSON request object.
      atomicInteger - An AtomicInteger for ID generation.

      This method handles various types of fields and their values, including handling self-referential loops, maps, arrays, objects, and primitive types. It adds parameters to the paramList based on the type and structure of the given field, recursively calling itself for nested or complex types.

      返回:
      A List of ApiParam instances representing the built parameters.

    • buildMapParam

      public static List<ApiParam> buildMapParam(String[] globGicName, String pre, int level, String isRequired, boolean isResp, Map<String,String> registryClasses, ProjectDocConfigBuilder projectBuilder, Set<String> groupClasses, Set<String> jsonViewClasses, int pid, boolean jsonRequest, int nextLevel, AtomicInteger atomicInteger)
      Builds a list of ApiParam objects for a map parameter.
      参数:
      globGicName - the global generic name array
      pre - the prefix string
      level - the level of the parameter
      isRequired - the requirement status of the parameter
      isResp - the response flag
      registryClasses - the map of registry classes
      projectBuilder - the project configuration builder
      groupClasses - the set of group classes
      jsonViewClasses - A set of valid `@JsonView` classes.
      pid - the parent ID
      jsonRequest - the JSON request flag
      nextLevel - the next level of the parameter
      atomicInteger - the atomic integer for generating unique IDs
      返回:
      a list of ApiParam objects

    • dictionaryListComment

      public static String dictionaryListComment(List<com.power.common.model.EnumDictionary> enumDataDict)

    • primitiveReturnRespComment

      public static List<ApiParam> primitiveReturnRespComment(String typeName, AtomicInteger atomicInteger, int pid)

    • handleEnumComment

      public static String handleEnumComment(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaClass javaClass, ProjectDocConfigBuilder projectBuilder)
      Handles the generation of comments for enum types in a Java class. If the class is an enum, it generates the corresponding enum comment based on the project configuration; otherwise, it returns an empty comment string.
      参数:
      javaClass - The JavaClass object containing class information.
      projectBuilder - The ProjectDocConfigBuilder object containing project configuration information.
      返回:
      The generated enum comment string.
